schemas.description: An array of URNs that identify the schema(s) that define the structure of this resource type.

id.description: Identifier of the resource type. Since Miro supports Users and Groups, the values are User or Group.

name.description: Name of the resource type. Since Miro supports Users and Groups, the values are User or Group.

description.description: Description of the resource type. Since Miro supports Users and Groups, the values are User or Group.

endpoint.description: Endpoint extension of the resource type. Since Miro supports Users and Groups, the values are /Users or /Groups.

schema.description: Schema URI of the resource type. Since Miro supports Users and Groups, the values are urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User or urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group.

schemaExtensions.description: Schema extensions supported for the resource type.

schema.description: Schema extension URI of the resource type.

required.description: Indicator of whether the schema extension is required.
